instruction: Hello! I am eagerly planning a Hong Kong food tour and have compiled a list of must-visit restaurants I have been longing to explore. However, I need some help organizing basic information about these restaurants. Can you help me with this favor? It would be great if you could search for these restaurants on Google Maps. I particularly want to obtain their addresses, any available websites, and contact phone numbers. I would be very grateful if you could collect this information and enter it into my form file. Thank you very much in advance!
